intent: Navigate to BoatTrader boats search page at https://www.boattrader.com/boats/
Click Private Seller option in seller type filter
reverse: Click Private Seller filter to show only owner listings

intent: Enter zip code 33101 in location search field
Set search radius to 25 miles from location
Select Recently Updated sort option for newest first
reverse: Click Recently Updated in sort dropdown

intent: Verify page shows private seller results and count under 5000
reverse: Check page heading contains private/owner and result count is reasonable

intent: Click the boat listing title text to open detail page
reverse: Click listing title link to view boat details

intent: Extract the current page URL from browser address bar
Scroll down past photo gallery to description section
reverse: Scroll down to find description and seller contact info

intent: Extract year make model price phone and seller name from listing
reverse: Read boat details and contact information from page

intent: Navigate back to search results page
Loop back to click next listing
Click Next page button to load more listings
reverse: Click Next page link to continue search

intent: Loop back to process listings on new page
